summary: Tested seasonal working hours feature in Employment Agreements page. Found and fixed backend bug where seasonal timing fields were not being saved. All features now working correctly.

features_tested.details: Page loads correctly at /employment-agreements with New Agreement button and existing agreements list
Checkbox 'Enable seasonal timing' in Employee tab - enabled by default

features_tested.feature: Winter timing fields: start time, end time, months
features_tested.details: Winter Timing section shows Start Time: 9:30 AM, End Time: 6:30 PM, Months: November to February

features_tested.feature: Summer timing fields: start time, end time, months
features_tested.details: Summer Timing section shows Start Time: 9:00 AM, End Time: 8:30 PM, Months: March to October

features_tested.feature: Preview shows seasonal working hours when enabled
features_tested.details: Preview shows 'Working Hours (Seasonal)' with Winter and Summer timing table

features_tested.feature: Preview shows fixed working hours when seasonal disabled
features_tested.details: When toggle disabled, shows 'Fixed Working Hours' input field with default '9:30 AM to 6:30 PM, Monday to Saturday'

bug_fixed.issue: Seasonal timing fields not being saved to database
bug_fixed.fix: Added enable_seasonal_timing, winter_start_time, winter_end_time, winter_months, summer_start_time, summer_end_time, summer_months, working_days fields to the agreement creation object

seed_data_creation: Created test agreements with seasonal timing enabled
context_for_next_testing_agent: Seasonal working hours feature fully implemented and tested. Backend now saves enable_seasonal_timing, winter_start_time, winter_end_time, winter_months, summer_start_time, summer_end_time, summer_months, and working_days fields. Default values: Winter 9:30 AM - 6:30 PM (Nov-Feb), Summer 9:00 AM - 8:30 PM (Mar-Oct). Toggle works to switch between seasonal and fixed hours in form and preview.
